strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js and React depth in recent roles (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq)
Current hands-on AI agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — a rare, explicitly required skill
Strong engineering craft: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing library authorship, plus cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, and MongoDB experience
concerns: No Nest.js experience mentioned, and Kotlin is absent from the skill set (Java appears only in older roles)
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly listed, though deep testing culture suggests fast ramp-up
Significant portion of past work is in D language and niche ecosystems, which is less directly transferable to the primary stack
response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 6+ years requirement with well over a decade of fullstack work, recent production experience in the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Kubernetes), and current AI-agent/MCP tooling work that directly matches the hardest-to-find requirement. A strong testing and software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, test framework authorship) aligns with the quality expectations. Gaps are narrow and learnable: Nest.js and Kotlin specifics, and explicit Vitest/Playwright usage. Overall an excellent fit for an internal-tooling senior fullstack role.
